data.title: Fair City on Friday: 'Not if I have an arrest warrant...'
data.incipit: Updated / Thursday, 23 Apr 2026 21:00 Ger's problems mount in Friday's Fair City on RTÉ One and the RTÉ Player. She is under pressure from DI Buckley as...
data.body: Updated / Thursday, 23 Apr 2026 21:00 Ger's problems mount in Friday's Fair Cit y on RTÉ One and the RTÉ Player. She is under pressure from DI Buckley as he investigates JJ. On Friday, Buckley arrives at Ger's door. "I warned you," says Ger. "You need a search warrant to come in here." "Not if I have an arrest warrant," replies Buckley. Fans can find out what happens next on Friday on RTÉ One and the RTÉ Player at 7:30pm. Fair City airs on RTÉ One and the RTÉ Player on Sundays, Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Fridays. Click here for more on the soaps. Catch up on Fair City on the RTÉ Player. Read Next
